global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with product outlines and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting a new collection with a limited-time offer.

elements.label: Solid green background
elements.description: A vibrant solid green background fills the entire canvas, creating a fresh and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: Three product outlines
elements.description: Three rectangular outlines representing products are centered in the ad, suggesting a display of items.

elements.label: Three product outlines
elements.description: Another set of three rectangular outlines representing products is centered in the ad, mirroring the first set.

elements.label: Three product outlines
elements.description: A third set of three rectangular outlines representing products is centered in the ad, completing the visual display.

elements.label: New collection announcement
elements.description: Bold black text at the center bottom reads 'New collection drop Only this weekend', emphasizing urgency.
elements.text_content: New collection drop Only this weekend

elements.label: BoltCart logo
elements.description: The logo 'BoltCart' is displayed in a prominent position at the top, featuring a modern font.

elements.label: Get offer button
elements.description: A small button at the bottom center with the text 'Get offer', designed to attract user interaction.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A small price tag displaying '€9.99' is positioned at the bottom left, indicating the cost of the products.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge at the top right corner with the text 'SALE', highlighting a promotional offer.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, new collection, sale.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by product outlines in the center, with the main message at the bottom and CTA below it.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: New collection drop Only this weekend, BoltCart, Get offer, €9.99, SALE
